validators.purpose: Validate the design document claim boundary.
validators.claim_boundary: No runtime proof, package action, profile creation, external-review result, or production status.

validators.purpose: Run scaffold structure checks and nested foundation validators.
validators.generated_evidence_policy: Nested validators may write ignored local evidence under build/wucios/devlanes/.
validators.claim_boundary: Scaffold-only and dry-run-only boundaries remain in force.

validators.purpose: Validate the minimal accepted planning input fixture.
validators.claim_boundary: Input validation does not create profiles or perform package actions.

validators.purpose: Confirm invalid planning fixtures are rejected and valid-input evidence remains stable.
validators.expected_scope: repo-local input fixtures and ignored Batch 3 evidence directory
validators.claim_boundary: Rejected inputs do not emit successful dry-run evidence.

validators.purpose: Compare repeated no-input dry-run evidence outputs.
validators.claim_boundary: Stability is local evidence stability only.

validators.purpose: Validate dry-run evidence files, allowlist, JSON parseability, stable repeats, and invalid-input rejection.
validators.claim_boundary: Evidence is local dry-run evidence only.

validators.purpose: Validate the canonical scaffold contract manifest.
validators.claim_boundary: Manifest validation records structure and boundaries only.

validators.purpose: Confirm planner output and evidence metadata bind to manifest identifiers.
validators.claim_boundary: Manifest binding is a local dry-run metadata check.

validators.purpose: Validate the no-execution plan vocabulary contract.
Confirm planner evidence uses only allowlisted plan action kinds.
validators.expected_scope: ignored Batch 6 plan vocabulary evidence directory
validators.claim_boundary: Planner output remains non-executing dry-run evidence.

validators.purpose: Validate the matrix that maps foundation claims to contracts, fixtures, validators, and evidence paths.
validators.claim_boundary: Traceability validation is a structural reviewer aid.

validators.purpose: Validate this registry and its agreement with the traceability matrix.
validators.claim_boundary: Registry validation records local validator ordering only.
